title: Fruitberries Creeper
description: A resource pack that makes creepers look like fruitberries with his classic smile :]
body:
# Fruitberries Creeper Resource Pack
Do you like fruitberries? If so, then this texture pack is for you! 

Spice up your survival world with creepers that have the classic smile of fruitberries! 

I originally saw this in one of fruitberries' videos, and made a texture pack so that others could have their creepers look like his!

Shout out to [3vis29](https://www.planetminecraft.com/mob-skin/no-face-creeper-faceless/) for making a creeper texture that has no face, which made making this texture pack significantly easier.
